title: T-077 — TO actuals inventory/location/shelf-life non-conformance trigger contract
prompt:
# T-077 — TO actuals trigger inventory/location/shelf-life non-conformance only

Wire the Technical-side contract for Transfer Order actuals: transfer events may update or review inventory/location/lot/shelf-life status in owning modules and may emit Technical/Quality non-conformance for shelf-life, temperature, location eligibility or lot status issues. They must never update factory_specs, BOM, supplier_specs or cost_per_kg. Provide idempotent handler/service for `to.transfer_actual_recorded` with typed reasons LOCATION_NOT_ALLOWED, LOT_STATUS_HOLD, SHELF_LIFE_TOO_SHORT, TEMPERATURE_EXCURSION. RED first: tests prove spec/BOM/cost tables remain unchanged.

pipeline_inputs.details: This task documents and enforces the boundary. If warehouse/inventory tables are absent, use event/outbox assertions and immutable master-data fixtures. Non-conformance ownership can be Quality event until 09-QUALITY schema exists. No app UI in this task. Non-conformance emission must use the shared contract from T-082 when present; until 09-QUALITY exists, persist/emit the exact outbox event shape defined there.
acceptance_criteria: Given transfer actual has shelf-life below FG requirement, then SHELF_LIFE_TOO_SHORT non-conformance is emitted and factory_specs/BOM/supplier_specs/cost are unchanged.
Given transfer actual has location not allowed for allergen segregation, then LOCATION_NOT_ALLOWED is emitted with lot/location references.
Given event retries with same idempotency key, then no duplicate non-conformance is created.
Given transfer actual proposes spec-like attributes, then handler ignores them and records boundary violation for review.

Given a variance is classified from to.transfer_actual_recorded, then emitted non_conformance.requested payload conforms to T-082 and includes source_event_id, idempotency_key, source_module, entity refs, reason codes and severity.
test_strategy: RED integration test with immutable master-data snapshots around handler.
risk_red_lines: Do not implement warehouse transfer logic.
Do not mutate Technical master data from TO actuals.
Do not own Quality investigation workflow.
Do not invent a PO/TO-specific NCR payload that diverges from T-082.
pipeline_inputs.description: Technical-side TO actuals non-conformance boundary contract without spec/BOM/cost mutation.
